title: Relationship Between BIBO and Asymptotic Stability
summary: This page presents Figure 2.17, illustrating how characteristic root locations correspond to zero-input response behaviors such as decay, growth, constant response, and oscillation. It then begins subsection 2.5-3, explaining the distinction between external/BIBO and internal/asymptotic stability and relating impulse-response integrability to characteristic roots in the left-half plane.

figures.caption: Location of characteristic roots and corresponding modes.
